tasks.label: SwarmX: Launch Full Stack
tasks.detail: Starts API + dashboard with operator-aware pressure monitoring

tasks.label: SwarmX: Migrate to APEX-17 r7
tasks.detail: Full r7 migration: backup, install, patch llm.py, rename Ollama models, validate

tasks.label: SwarmX: Migration Dry Run
tasks.detail: Show what the r7 migration would do without making any changes

tasks.label: SwarmX: Migration Rollback
tasks.detail: Restore previous configuration from latest .r6-backup-* directory

tasks.label: SwarmX: Validate Naming Standard
tasks.detail: Verify no -scar tags remain in active runtime paths

tasks.label: SwarmX: Evict Legacy -scar Models
tasks.detail: Remove all legacy -scar models from Ollama (post-migration cleanup)

tasks.label: SwarmX: Run Naming Tests
tasks.detail: Run 30+ test cases validating dual-layer naming consistency

tasks.label: SwarmX: Healthcheck (APEX-17 r7)
tasks.detail: Ollama + models + Relay + API + memory + naming compliance

tasks.label: SwarmX: Evict 7B Models (Free RAM)
tasks.command: for model in reason-deepseekr1-pro-q5km-prod code-qwen25-pro-q5km-prod plan-qwen25-pro-q5km-prod critique-deepseekr1-pro-q5km-prod plan-deepseekr1-pro-q5km-prod; do curl -s -X POST http://localhost:11434/api/generate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"model\":\"$model\",\"prompt\":\"\",\"keep_alive\":\"0s\",\"stream\":false}" > /dev/null && echo "Evicted $model"; done
tasks.detail: Evict all 7B operators (Oracle, Forge, Architect-qwen/deepseek, Auditor)

tasks.label: SwarmX: Evolve Layer (1 cycle)
tasks.detail: Run one cycle of Lab Operator evolution pipeline

tasks.label: SwarmX: Warm Relay Opt-In
tasks.command: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:11434/api/generate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"route-phi4-lite-q4km-prod","prompt":"classify: ping","keep_alive":"2m","stream":false,"options":{"num_predict":8}}' | python3 -m json.tool
tasks.detail: Explicitly preload Relay for this session with a short keep_alive. Not part of default startup on 8 GB hosts.
